title: Classic Ginger Molasses Cookies
description: Soft, chewy, and full of spice, these classic cookies are a staple of the holiday season. Made with molasses and ginger, they're perfect for dunking in your morning coffee.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in molasses and eggs until well combined.
Gradually mix in flour mixture until a dough forms.
Roll dough into balls, about 1 tablespoon each. Place on prepared baking sheet, leaving 2 inches of space between each cookie.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until edges are set and centers are slightly soft.
Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
